input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(224, 221, 213) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(17, 17, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(22, 22, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
input[type=\"search\"].font-family: "??", Inter, "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif, "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

input[type=\"text\"].font-family: "??", Inter, "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif, "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

kbd.background: rgb(13, 13, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(232, 190, 100, 0.22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mjx-container.MathJax.font-family: "??", "Phosphor Body", "Source Serif 4", Georgia, serif, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

p.font-family: "??", Inter, "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif, "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

pre.--ec-codeFontFml: '??', 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', 'Consolas', monospace, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace
pre.--ec-uiFontFml: '??', 'Inter', 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif, '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
pre.background: rgb(13, 13, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre:has(> code.language-mermaid).background: rgb(13, 13, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

progress.font-family: "??", "Phosphor Body", "Source Serif 4", Georgia, serif, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

svg.lucide-help-circle.svg-icon.font-family: "??", Inter, "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif, "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

svg.lucide-pencil.svg-icon.font-family: "??", Inter, "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif, "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

th.background: rgb(26, 26, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead th.background: rgb(26, 26, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

video.font-family: "??", "Phosphor Body", "Source Serif 4", Georgia, serif, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
